description: I can consider it the best NPM software out there, it is suitable for types of organizations starting with small till large & very large, I have been using it for more than 4 years & i'm satisfied.
author: Hossam S.
pros: NPM is one of the best Network performance Monitoring software out there, it allows me to add any type of objects within my Network Environment, Network nodes, Server nodes either Windows or Linux, and i can select the elements that i need to add & add the needed reports & alerts based on my needs.
cons: What is least that i like about it is that when it crashes, or stops all of a sudden, then the Alerts & the Reports stop working & i have to login to the Application server to troubleshoot the problem, yet the support is always good & helping.

review_title: Network Performance Monitor Gives Us Value for Money
description: Network Performance Monitor gives us incredible experiences and insights.
author: Paul V.
pros: The features of Network Performance Monitor are easy to understand. I also love the accuracy of Network Performance Monitor.
cons: Network Performance Monitor is easy to use and flawless. Network Performance Monitor meets our needs.

author: Michal K.
pros: I was testing this software as I needed network monitoring tool, their real-time alerting feature is really good.
cons: There was a lot of setup involved. With complex network design it would take a lot of time to set the software up.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: My NPM for critical NOC Monitoring and its operations
description: NPM is the best solution when it comes to performance monitoring as for sure no other product can beat in terms of monitoring like Netflow, web filtering, interface, CPU, bandwidth, disk, servers, DB, etc... and many more. Even though it is best but has complications in learning and budget issues.
author: shabbir S.
pros: if there is something that everyone is interested in this product is its capability and performance. It makes network engineers' jobs easy and to identify errors quickly and focus on things that were really required. Analysis of network firewalls on a very high basis like bandwidth utilization, Netflow, web filter, etc.. for engineers to analyze and identify when any issue comes up.
cons: Budget is always an issue so many times after POC clients prefer for alternate solutions as it is best in capabilities of monitoring but its concerns about the budget when it comes SMB customers especially.

description: I have used multiple network monitoring softwares and there is no comparison with the support and quality of software with SolarWinds. A perfect monitoring tool with out of the box reporting and alerting with extreme customizations.
author: fazal A.
pros: I have been using this software for a very long time and its graphical representations and reporting is so top notch and its very easy to install, configure, and troubleshoot and interact with highly skilled individuals on its Thwack Community and share and discuss new ideas and look for guidance/assistance and documentation with labs and we can collect points to exchange with gifts and certification vouchers.
cons: Its a bit costly and fortigate firewalls are not supported completely to provide its site to site vpn details like it shows for cisco asa. It would be great to be able to monior our vpn and who gets in and out of our network.
author_profession: Customer support and technical writing specialist

review_title: Best tool we have for NPM
author: Earl W.
pros: Ease of implementation and usage we see a lot!
cons: The interface could use a refresh and I hope its coming on a future release soon

description: Great tool, easy to deploy, dashboards work really well, performance monitor helps keep track of issues as they arise.
author: Richard R.
pros: Dashboards to show your real estate ata glance, alerts and warnings are easily identified and make life so much easier when picking up on issues.
cons: The cost, as with everything it comes at a cost. When management asks why we are paying for something when nothing breaks, that's the idea!! Fix before break.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Network Performance Monitor Is Easy to Use and Reliable
description: Network Performance Monitor has incredible capabilities. I have a great experience.
author: Ahmed M.
pros: I am impressed by the accuracy of Network Performance Monitor. Network Performance Monitor is easy to use.
cons: I do not dislike Network Performance Monitor at all.. Network Performance Monitor is exceptional.

review_title: We use NPM to monitor our network stack.
author: Chris L.
pros: Fast, clear status of performance and possible outages. Easy integration with other tools and custom alert mechanisms. A focused company who is very involved in making great tutorials.
cons: The GUI is starting to look dated, it could use a complete overhaul. License needs can be tricky to determine.

author: Andre F.
pros: This has to be by far the best networking and services monitoring tool I have ever used. It is rich in features and it just works.
cons: It is an amazing system and I would recommend to anyone. It is however a little time consuming to set it up, for some people even a little challenging.

author: Prashant B.
pros: It gives a clear view of our network in real-time, making it easy to spot and fix issues before they cause major downtime.
cons: The setup takes some time and it is difficult for new users to understand it at first time
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Solarwinds for server and network monitoring
description: I have good expereince with the tool , its easy to use and implement.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is one of the good tool , we can easily configure and monitor servers and network devices in SolarWinds.
cons: I think licensing capabilities or complexity can be reduced , sometime I feel its more complex.

review_title: You get what you pay for, mostly
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is a full featured product with many optional add on modules to keep a "single pane of glass" for IT departments.
cons: Finding personnel with fine tuning experience, education and knowledge is somewhat difficult at times, making many implementations half completed.

description: The ability to constantly monitor the health of my network.
author: Michael G.
pros: What's not to love? Deep, Reliable, and an absolute monitoring beast. I use this daily - DAILY - to monitor my company's environment. The awareness that it gives you is bar none the best around.
cons: Cost can get hefty depending on how many modules you use. If your company is in a lucky enough position to accept the price, then you are in for a treat.

description: You can trust this software to watch over the network while you perform other tasks. If there is an issue, you will be alerted immediately
author: michael T.
pros: Solarwinds Network Performance Monitor gives you in-depth details about every server and switch. Once it is installed and configured, you just sit back, relax and engage in worry free monitoring of your network (unless of course it gives you an alert)
cons: It is very expensive. The company that I worked for that used SolarWinds had no issue spending the money though, so after I left it was like leaving a family member behind.

description: Great software for network monitoring and good reporting for high-level executives.
author: Thatayaone M.
pros: It shows bandwidth utilization for your network devices. Can easily see nodes that are done. Good notification and alert features. Good reporting
cons: Licensing is pricey License renewals Building custom reports can be a challenge, it's not that easy.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Accurate Performance to every network devices.
cons: It takes 3 min of time to trigger the device down mail alert.

description: We use this to monitor client network. Mostly on the infrastructure side but can also be used to monitor services.
author: Nathan G.
pros: Excellent software for network visibility. Lots of feature for managing and monitoring your network.
cons: Older versions we're lacking support for many devices. Fixed with recent updates

review_title: Great Network Monitoring tool which is always coming out with new features
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: This is just one of the many suite of applications that SolarWinds offers to help manage the Network. Ease to use and helps diagnose / troubleshoot issues. Easy to automate alerts to notify you of problems afterhours. Great graphical interface as well.
cons: Is more costly than other tools but worth the cost as SolarWinds will take less time to manage over time.

review_title: Great Network Monitoring tool for organizations of all sizes.
author: Derrick B.
pros: Network Performance Monitor (NPM) is an excellent tool to get a overview of the how you network is performing. The setup is easy and if there is something that is confusing or causing trouble it can be solved using google search or heading to the Thwack community provided by Solar Winds.
cons: I don't hate the product but some of the UI features are quirky, and haven't gotten used to yet. There does seem to be a lot of customizability but figuring out how to get the setup how you want it seems to take too long to do.

review_title: Simple and to the point, very concise when you need a minimal amount of information.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I can pull up any piece of networking information in a matter of seconds. There is not a big learning curve.
cons: Sometimes it seems to be too minimal, some features that are present in other network performance monitors are lacking in SolarWinds' version.

review_title: Many things are interesting but comes at a huge cost.
author: Sachin P.
pros: The details that it provides are huge and so many little intricate details to monitor and take care about. Gives peace of mind once installed properly for sure.
cons: For a network monitoring tool, a little too expensive. Huge customization are needed at some step but not necessary that you might need to too.

description: Being able to forget about the network 24/7 and rely on it to notify us when something is wrong.
author: Ashton B.
pros: Ease of install, ease of customization, and easy to learn based on the interface. Without training, I was able to pick it up and run with it.
cons: The cost is the only concern I have. You buy modules based on what you need, and I think one package with all would make life easier.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: rohit N.
pros: Great tool who are interested in Computer Networking and want to explore the background of any network as well as will be aware of it.
cons: Not for a beginner that is for sure since it requires you to have certain level of knowledge of a network.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Raghav B.
pros: It is able to monitor every device in your company and check for high cpu utilization, low memory, failures and errors. As well as make backups of all your devices. Works with almost all network products and can be customized using universal pollers to handle almost any imaginable product.
cons: Slow performance on web interface. I think they should work on the overall look of the program, integrate more features into the SolarWinds NPM suite.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
